summary: Completed frontend testing of Preventive Maintenance page refactoring. All 10 tests passed (100%). Features tested: default tree view, card view switching, checklists navigation, execute dialog, edit dialog, book button disabled state, OT creation with PM-[Name] title, and redirect to work-orders.
critical_code_review_comments: PreventiveMaintenance.jsx correctly implements default 'tree' view mode (line 30: useState('tree'))
View toggle buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Execute dialog correctly creates OT with 'PM-[Name]' title format (line 170: titre: `PM-${pm.titre}`)
Book button correctly disabled when no checklist_id (line 495: disabled={!item.checklist_id})
ChecklistsManagement.jsx properly implements CRUD with icon buttons
seed_data_creation: Created test OT 'PM-dvbngn' (#5804) during execution flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preventive Maintenance page refactoring fully tested. Key features: 1) Default view is 'Arborescence' (tree), 2) 'Carte' button switches to card view, 3) 'Gérer les Checklists' navigates to /preventive-maintenance/checklists, 4) Play button opens execute dialog and creates OT with PM-[Name] title, 5) Book button disabled when no checklist associated, 6) Pencil button opens edit form. All icon buttons (Play, Pencil, Book, Trash) working correctly.

default_view_arborescence.evidence: Tree button has bg-blue-600 class on page load

carte_view_switch.test: Click Carte button switches to card view
carte_view_switch.evidence: Card button gets bg-blue-600 class after click, cards displayed

checklists_page_crud.test: Checklists page displays list with CRUD buttons
checklists_page_crud.evidence: Stats cards, checklist cards with Play/Pencil/History/Trash buttons visible

play_button_execute_dialog.evidence: Dialog with 'Exécuter la maintenance' title and 'Créer l'OT' button

ot_creation_pm_name.test: Execute creates OT with title PM-[Name] and status 'En Cours'

pencil_button_edit_dialog.test: Pencil button opens edit form dialog
pencil_button_edit_dialog.evidence: Dialog with 'Modifier maintenance préventive' title and form fields

book_button_disabled.test: Book button disabled when no checklist_id
book_button_disabled.evidence: Buttons with title='Aucune checklist associée' found disabled

retour_button_navigation.test: 'Retour' button on checklists page navigates back

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/pm_page_initial.png - Initial PM page with tree view
.screenshots/work_orders_after_ot.png - Work orders page after OT creation
